name: Sand Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and powdered sugar until smooth.
2. Add vanilla extract and mix well.
3. Stir in chopped nuts and flour until combined.
4. Roll into 1-inch wide crescents on a floured surface.
5. Place the crescents about an inch apart on a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes or until lightly golden.
7. Allow to cool slightly before rolling each tart in powdered sugar.
